creator: dfranzoni@coopcsc.it
text:
Hi,
I have tested the syslog-ng on my pfSense firewall to sending logs to in cloud logs repository systems (Loggly and LogEntries)and I noticed these things:
1) in the web GUI "general" settings allow only to setup local disk file destination. And this is not a problem if... (look numer 2 and 3)
2) the "advanced" settings not allow all the configuration parameters allowed by syslog-ng guide. If I compose a "destination" configurazione within the template the GUI show an error. The configuration is correct because I have successfully tested with manual configuration of the "syslog-ng.conf" but the web GUI not allow it.
3) with the "advanced" settings I noticed that it create the configuration file "syslog-ng.conf" with configuration order as the GUI items order. And this is not correct and I can't modify the GUI items order. In fact if I add a second "destination" with a "template" item the generated "syslog-ng.conf" must to have the "template" configuration before "destination" configuration. But with web GUI I can't have it.

With manual modification of the "syslog-ng.conf" file all work correcty but I can't start the service by web GUI.
I tested the configuration with "syslog-ng -Fevd" command and all work righ.

Thank you for your help and if I can help you I am at your disposition.

Davide
